title: Long-read sequencing and data processing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"19eq","text":"Long-read sequencing and data processing methods from Kilfeather, Khoo et al., 2024","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Twelve TRAP samples and three TOTAL samples were sequenced using the Oxford Nanopore Technologies MinION platform. TRAP samples were equally divided by age and genotype (N = 3 per age:genotype). Library preparation was performed using the cDNA-PCR kit (SQK-PCS109). Raw fast5 data was basecalled and demultiplexed using Guppy (v4.5.2). Read data from FASTQfiles were aligned to the mm10 genome (Gencode M25 GRCm38.p6) using minimap2 (v2.18, RRID:SCR_018550) 57 . Transcript level quantification was then performed using Salmon (v1.4.0, RRID:SCR_017036) 58 .
creator: Peter Kilfeather
